context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the code-quality instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Duplicated functions must be extracted** — when 2+ modules share >70% similar implementations, create a shared module

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Functions must stay below ABC complexity 30** — break complex functions into smaller helpers

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Duplicated templates must become components** — when 2+ HEEx files share >40% identical markup, extract to a function component

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Run `mix credo --strict` before any PR**

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Run `mix sobelow` for security** — check after quality checks

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Run analysis** — `mix credo --strict` to identify all issues

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify fixes** — re-run `mix credo --strict` to confirm all issues are resolved
